title: Aterian Inc (ATER) Q1 2025 Earnings Summary
text: Net revenue declined 24% year-over-year in Q1 2025, primarily due to SKU rationalization and changes in Amazon's affiliate program. Gross margin contracted to 61.4% from 65.1% previously, attributable to product mix shifts. The company managed to slightly improve its adjusted EBITDA loss despite a 24% decline in net revenue. Cash position of $14.3 million, enabling operations without equity raises in 2025. The company has withdrawn its 2025 financial guidance due to current economic uncertainty, particularly surrounding tariff volatility. Cost reduction efforts targeting $5-6 million in annualized savings through fixed cost cuts and headcount reductions. Supply chain diversification aimed to reduce China reliance to 30% by end of 2025. Moving into tariff-exempt consumables for product expansion. Paused share buyback program to prioritize cash conservation. Revenue decline stems from SKU rationalization and changes in Amazon's affiliate program, while tariff exposure and e-commerce price sensitivity complicate near-term outlook.
